articles.author: Sarah Talbi
articles.title: Found in Earth’s Driest Desert, This Crystal May Hold the Secret to Detecting Life on Mars - Indian Defence Review
articles.description: In one of Earth’s harshest deserts, translucent crystals are preserving microbial traces, clues that could reshape the search for past life on Mars.
articles.content: Mars is now a cold, radiation-battered world. Yet a broad body of evidence shows that billions of years ago, liquid water flowed across its surface. That wetter past has long fueled the idea that lif… [+3607 chars]
